notableEvents.label: Tyler Freeman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman grounds into a double play, shortstop Vidal Bruján to second baseman Marcus Semien to first baseman Mark Vientos. Mickey Moniak out at 2nd. Tyler Freeman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jake McCarthy grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Umpire reviewed (home run), call on the field was upheld: Jake McCarthy hits a grand slam (2) to right field. Brenton Doyle scores. Ezequiel Tovar scores. Willi Castro scores.

notableEvents.label: Mark Vientos GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mark Vientos grounds into a double play, second baseman Edouard Julien to shortstop Willi Castro to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Bo Bichette out at 2nd. Mark Vientos out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Brett Baty pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brett Baty flies out to left fielder Mickey Moniak.
